John Hollister built this Glastonbury house in 1649
Lieut John Hollister
memoryArtifacts.description:
Birth: 	1612, England
Death: 	1665
Wethersfield
Hartford County
Connecticut, USA

Reportedly baptised 28 May 1618 in Bristol, Gloucester, England. Married Johanna Treat before 1642. Died after 3 Apr 1665, when he signed his will. Their child: Elizabeth (Hollister) Wells.
See The Hollister Family of America: Lieut. John Hollister, of Wethersfield, Conn., and His Descendants, by Lafayette Wallace Case, 1886, p. 25, http://search.ancestry.com/Browse/BookView.aspx?dbid=10289&iid=dvm_GenMono000125-00011-1. 
 
Family links: 
 Spouse:
  Johanna Treat Hollister (1618 - 1694)
 
 Children:
  John Hollister (1642 - 1711)*
  Elizabeth Hollister Wells (1642 - 1673)*
  Mary Hollister Welles (1650 - 1713)*
 
*Calculated relationship
 
Burial:
Unknown

popularStory.headline: Life Sketch of John Hollister  B. 1612
popularStory.description:
John Hollister was born about 1610, probably in Glastonbury, England.  His parents might have been Thomas Hale and Joan Kirby.

     John married Joanna Treat in 1641 in Wethersfield, Connecticut.  H …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lt. John Hollister於1612年5月28日出生在英國英格蘭布里斯托時，他的父親Thomas Hollister32歲，母親Alice Walker27歲。他於1642年與Johanna Treat在英國英格蘭薩默塞特普布洛福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1665年4月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年52歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.Publow, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特普布洛福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lt. John Hollister于1612年5月28日出生在英国英格兰布里斯托时，他的父亲Thomas Hollister32岁，母亲Alice Walker27岁。他于1642年与Johanna Treat在英国英格兰薩默塞特普布洛福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1665年4月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年52岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hollister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): nickname from a derivative of Old French holier ‘adulterer, lecher’. Compare Hollier .

variants.name: Hollier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Clovis, Nicolle, Pierre, Vernice.
French and English: unflattering nickname from Old French holier ‘libertine, lecher’, Middle English hol(i)er ‘adulterer, fornicator; brothel keeper’.
English: probably a variant of   Huller   ‘roofer, tiler’ (see   Hillier  ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Lt. John Hollister was born on 28 May 1612, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Hollister, was 32 and his mother, Alice Walker, was 27. He married Johanna Treat in 1642, in Publow, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 3 April 1665, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 52, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lt. John Hollister est né le 28 mai 1612, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Hollister, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Walker, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Treat en 1642, à Publow, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 3 avril 1665, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lt. John Hollister am 28. Mai 1612 in Bristol, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hollister 32 und seine Mutter Alice Walker 27. Er hat 1642 in Publow, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Johanna Treat geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. April 1665 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lt. John Hollister è nato il il 28 maggio 1612 nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Hollister, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alice Walker, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Treat nel 1642, nel Publow, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 aprile 1665, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lt. John Hollisterが1612年5月28日にイギリスイギリスブリストルで生まれた時，父Thomas Hollisterは32歳，母Alice Walkerは27歳であった。1642年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトプウブロウでJohanna Treatと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1665年4月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで52歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lt. John Hollister(이)가 1612년 5월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hollister(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Walker(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1642년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 푸블로에서 Johanna Treat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1665년 4월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lt. John Hollister nasceu em 28 de maio de 1612, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Hollister, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Walker, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Treat em 1642, em Publow, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de abril de 1665, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lt. John Hollister родился 28 мая 1612 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Hollister было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Walker, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Treat в 1642 г. в местности публоу, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 3 апреля 1665 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lt. John Hollister nació el 28 de mayo de 1612, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Hollister, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Walker, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Johanna Treat en 1642, en Publow, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de abril de 1665, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
